info.english_meaning: to blazeto glowto shine to burn
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: jvalAdiprayojanaM tu kftsu eva taTApi gaRajYAnAya atra jvalAditvaM nirdizwam  ' kasa gatO ' ityantAH jvalAdayaH  ayaM DAtuH GawAdO api asti

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yA hutA (AhutayaH) ujjvalanti' (Sa0 brA0 146110) ujjvalanti UrDvaM jvalanti udarcizo Bavanti UrDvaSiKAH satyo jvalanti
